category_sources: source_facts.description says Plank is a framework for generating immutable model objects; official docs show Plank generating model classes from schemas.

docs_sources: Official Plank documentation is hosted at pinterest.github.io/plank/docs.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe generating immutable model objects from JSON schemas.
